description:
Advances: specled.spec_review (extending its requirements; consider adding a triangle_code_classification requirement)

Load-bearing fix #1. Today the leg classifier in lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex:278-283 (sync diagram) and :423-489 (sync checklist) only knows spec-validate codes and a few branch_guard_missing_* codes. Wire the actual triangle vocabulary so the diagram and checklist reflect what concepts.md says they reflect:

- SPEC↔CODE leg: add branch_guard_realization_drift, branch_guard_dangling_binding
- SPEC↔TESTS leg: add branch_guard_untested_realization, requirement_without_test_tag, branch_guard_requirement_without_test_tag
- CODE↔TESTS leg: add branch_guard_untethered_test, branch_guard_underspecified_realization
- Spec well-formed leg (build_sync_checks first row): add overlap/duplicate_covers, overlap/must_stem_collision
- Add a new "Decisions / governance" check row covering append_only/* family

Acceptance: a fixture PR that emits one of each code class flips the corresponding leg/check from green to amber. Verify against existing tests in test/specled_ex/review_test.exs (extend if needed).

Log: ~/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/985e3e4e-1dd3-43de-8a05-67a8b7029e85/subagents/agent-a192afbe8a68a1e29.jsonl

Commit: 3d8a68d11ca2068cb94e737ee9dacbaf11170010
Branch: specled_-quj.1/triangle-leg-codes
Worktree: /Users/mz/src/specled_ex-quj.1

Files touched:
- lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex
- .spec/specs/spec_review.spec.md
- .spec/state.json (regenerated)
- test/specled_ex/review/html_test.exs (new)

Tests added (test/specled_ex/review/html_test.exs):
- 6 tests pinning render_sync_diagram leg classification (SPEC<->CODE,
  SPEC<->TESTS, CODE<->TESTS) for every new code class.
- 12 tests pinning build_sync_checks rows: Spec well-formed,
  Spec -> Code triangle row, Spec -> Tests rows (two), Code -> Tests
  row, and Decisions / governance row covering each append_only/* code.
- 1 test that asserts "Decisions / governance" row exists.
- 1 test that asserts the row covers every append_only/* code.
- 3 meta-tests asserting parity between concepts.md vocabulary and the
  classifier (every diagram triangle code flips an edge; checklist-only
  overlap codes flip rows but not edges).
- 31 tests total in the new file, all passing.

Verification stubs flipped: added a new `command` verification entry in
spec_review.spec.md targeting `mix test test/specled_ex/review/html_test.exs`
covering specled.spec_review.triangle_code_classification (a new `must`
requirement added to the spec). Existing spec verification entries
unchanged.

Spec change: added `specled.spec_review.triangle_code_classification`
requirement (must, evolving). The ticket's Advances: line said "consider
adding a triangle_code_classification requirement"; I added it because
the work is concrete behavior that deserves a normative anchor for
future bounces.

Summary: render_sync_diagram now classifies findings into the three
sides of the triangle described in docs/concepts.md, and
build_sync_checks gains rows for the realization-drift, untested-
realization, untethered-test, overlap, and append_only/* code classes
that were previously only visible in the flat findings list. A fixture-
style triage carrying any one of those codes now flips the matching
diagram edge or checklist row from green to amber, which is what the
ticket's acceptance criterion asks for.

mix spec.check: pass (status=pass errors=0 warnings=0; branch
findings=0 after the new test file was added to the spec_review
surface).
mix test: 595 tests, 0 failures.

title: Wire triangle finding codes into diagram + checklist legs
